title: astragalus medius
intro: Astragalus medius, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant in the legume family native to Asia and Eastern Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress and promote balance in the immune system. The medicinal properties of Astragalus medius include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which may contribute to its health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, reducing inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus medius can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
